title: T4: Protocol Version Handshake — Boot Validation
description: Create src/hounfour/protocol-handshake.ts. validateProtocolAtBoot() calls GET ARRAKIS_BASE_URL/api/internal/health for contract_version. Base URL derived via new URL(billingUrl).origin if ARRAKIS_BASE_URL not set. Uses validateCompatibility() from loa-hounfour v5. Fail-fast in production on incompatible/unreachable/missing. WARN in dev. Missing contract_version field = fail with upgrade message.
acceptance_criteria: Handshake before server listens; compatible=INFO+continue; incompatible+prod=fail; incompatible+dev=WARN; unreachable+prod=fail; unreachable+dev=WARN; missing config+prod=fail; missing config+dev=skip; URL derivation via new URL().origin tested with multiple shapes
close_reason: done

title: T5: Router Integration — Wire Finalize into Post-Inference Flow
description: Wire finalize into router.ts and server.ts startup. Add billingFinalize? to HounfourRouterOptions. invokeForTenant: finalize after recordCost succeeds, try/catch isolation (never throws past router). invokeWithTools: finalize ONCE at end. invoke: NO finalize (local). Construct BillingFinalizeClient only when ARRAKIS_BILLING_URL set (implicit feature flag). Wire validateProtocolAtBoot before server.listen(). DLQ replay timer every 5min. Ordering invariant: only finalize if recordCost succeeded and totalCostMicro is definitive. E2E: reservation_id from gateway propagates through RequestMetadata to finalize call unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: billingFinalize optional in opts; invokeForTenant calls finalize after recordCost; invokeWithTools once at end; invoke NO finalize; WARN on missing reservation_id; handshake before listen; DLQ timer active; no client when no URL; finalize wrapped try/catch; finalize only after recordCost; internal error returns {inline:false}
close_reason: done

title: T2: Reservation ID Propagation — Types + Gateway Extraction
description: Add reservation_id to RequestMetadata (types.ts) and JWTClaims (jwt-auth.ts). Extract from verified JWT claims in gateway (server.ts). Strip x-internal-reservation-id header unconditionally at start of request handling (pre-auth). Header fallback gated by ALLOW_RESERVATION_HEADER_FALLBACK env var (default: false). Source of truth: JWT claim signed by arrakis. Propagation: stored on request context (RequestMetadata), not headers.
acceptance_criteria: RequestMetadata.reservation_id optional; JWTClaims.reservation_id optional; header stripped pre-auth; reservation_id set ONLY from verified JWT claims; header fallback env-gated; test: client-injected header does NOT reach handler; E2E: reservation_id from gateway matches finalize call

title: T-1.4: Implement GracefulShutdown handler
description: GracefulShutdown with 25s deadline within ECS 30s stopTimeout. In-flight request draining: HTTP server.close() stops accepting new connections, existing keep-alive connections drained. Background pollers (calibration, EMA refresh) receive shutdown signal and complete current iteration. undici Agent: agent.close() drains in-flight requests. If deadline reached, force-exit with process.exit(1).

title: T3: BillingFinalizeClient — New Module
description: Create src/hounfour/billing-finalize-client.ts. BillingFinalizeClient class with finalize() and replayDeadLetter(). S2S JWT with sub/aud/iss claims (ES256, reuses existing S2SJwtSigner with kid). 300ms inline timeout via AbortSignal. actual_cost_micro as string BigInt, validated non-negative. tenant_id in request (not account_id). reservation_id is the idempotency key — arrakis returns 409 on duplicate. Error matrix: 200=success, 401/404/422=DLQ with reason, 409=idempotent success, 5xx=retry+DLQ. DLQ entry schema: {reservation_id, tenant_id, actual_cost_micro, trace_id, reason, response_status, attempt_count, next_attempt_at}. Bounded retries: 5 attempts, exponential backoff. finalize() NEVER throws — always returns FinalizeResult.
acceptance_criteria: BillingFinalizeClient exported; S2S JWT includes sub/aud/iss; 300ms timeout; cost as string validated non-negative; tenant_id not account_id; all error codes handled; 409 idempotent; DLQ with Redis+JSONL; DLQ entry schema complete; finalize never throws; structured logging
close_reason: done
